feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HANA Cloud - How to identify the unused database objects
entry.content:
We have a lot of objects in the database and we are working on cleanup activity.

I am trying to identify the unused database objects tables, procedures, calculation views etc., (Let's say the objects which are not used at least in the last one year)

But I am not able to find any system tables which give that info directly.

Can someone suggest me the best way / SQL to use?

entry.title: How to get the URL of the OdataService generated by CDS
entry.content:
Hello Guys!

I am developing in the Business application studio for quite some time Hana CDS views and I have started to generate Odata Services. 

I know what is the url of the main branch for testing the odata service but right now If I want to test an Odata Service I have to merge back my development into the main branch to test it out.

My questions is how to the get URL for the service that exists in my own development hana container.
I would like to test my services before merging but this is impossible I have know clue where to look for the URL

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Unable to Update Data in Custom External S/4HANA OData Service (SSAM2405)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to integrate an additional external S/4HANA OData service (our own custom service) into the standard SAP Service and Asset Manager (SSAM) 2405 application.

Steps we followed:

  1. Created a destination in SAP Mobile Services for our external S/4HANA service.

     2. Added the service to the standard SSAM metadata by creating a new service in the Z component  

           

     3. After synchronization, the service metadata was generated successfully (XML created without errors)

     4. We are able to read data from the backend service successfully in the application

Issue:

When we try to update data from the Edit page, the Save action triggers the OData Update action, but the data is not updated. We are receiving an Internal Server Error.

In the backend traces, only GET requests are being triggered. There are no POST or PUT requests being sent during the update operation.

 

Question:

Is it supported to use a custom external S/4HANA OData service within the standard SSAM metadata?

If yes:

  • Are there any additional configuration steps required to update the data? Have we missed anything?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: Clarifications Needed on Universal Allocation(Manage allocation app)Capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Clou
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We have a requirement where allocations need to be transferred from one cost center to multiple cost centers, and from one project to another project. While reviewing the Universal Allocation functionality (Manage Allocations app) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, I have a few questions for which I would appreciate clarification or guidance from the community:

  1. Is there an option to enable approval workflows for allocation cycles or allocation execution?
  2. Can we define or use a new Journal Entry Type for postings generated by Universal Allocation?
  3. Is it possible to allocate from one Statistical Project to another Statistical Project?
  4. Is there any way to manually enter a custom Document Header Text as an identifier during the allocation run?

Thanks

Ribin  KP

entry.title: No receivers were found for segment error When Using Variable Portion with Actual Quantity
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are using the Manage Allocations app to execute a Cost Center Distribution where the Receiver Rule = Variable Portion and Receiver Basis Type = Actual Quantity.

In this setup:

  • The receiver account assignment is a Cost Center.
  • The receiver basis account is the G/L account where time‑entry quantities are posted during billing‑related processes.
  • We have also confirmed that the receiver cost center has valid time‑entry quantity postings for the specific period used in the allocation cycle.

    However, when we run the allocation test, we receive an error stating that no receiver is found, and the allocation process cannot continue.

    We have attached the screenshot for reference and would appreciate your support in understanding why the system is not recognizing the receiver in this Actual Quantity scenario.

Thanks

Ribin k p

entry.title: Purpose of Field Group Status “Actual Quantities” in Manage allocation App.
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I would like to understand the purpose of the Field Group Status “Actual Quantities” in Manage Allocation app within SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Can someone help explain what “Actual Quantities” represents in the field group context and how it influences the allocation calculation when using quantity‑based receiver rules (such as Variable Portion → Actual Quantity)?
Thanks 
Ribin k p

entry.title: BTP HANA Cloud Runtime Environment: Other or Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are receiving some mixed signals here. We are say broading our footprint on BTP. Especially we have requirements to use HANA Cloud as persistence layer on BTP. Something we did not do yet

When it comes to runtime environments we have two choices

  • Other
  • Cloud Foundry

When looking at the resources, I get mixed signals

  • Undefined
    • Within help there is (at least what I found) little evidence, when to use which.
  • Leaning towards Other
    • When looking at community, I fould this multi-part blog that seems to outline, that "Other" is an addition and improvement from a former only possible Cloud Foundry
  • Leaning towards Cloud Foundry (? but maybe I misinterpret)
    • Developing SAP HANA in the Cloud Foundry Environment | SAP Help Portal

Currently my guts feeling is, using Other Environment is way to go, but not sure I got that right. Please help 🙂

Cheers

Jens

entry.title: Service instances stuck in "Deletion in Progress" on BTP Trial - cannot delete
entry.content:
Hi,

My SAP BTP trial service instances are permanently stuck in
"Deletion in Progress" state.

Org: 1cf0785atrial
Space: dev
User: arul04067@gmail.com

Stuck instances:
1. Demo_cap-db (GUID: 352e6edf-b95b-414b-9f8b-91de53f4e9e6)
2. Demo_cap-hdiDemo_cap-db-deployer-ws-ood
3. my-hana-db

Root cause: HANA Cloud DB was deleted so HDI broker
cannot connect to drop the bindings.

Things I tried:
- cf delete-service → failed
- cf purge-service-instance → not authorized
- cf curl DELETE on bindings → no effect
- BTP Cockpit UI delete → stuck forever

Please help force delete these instances.

entry.title: ODN for Italy in ARIBA CIM
entry.content:
Hello, 

Since we are using ARIBA CIM for Supplier Invoice Management in our Italian subsidiary together with SAP S4 Hana Cloud Public, SAP has recommended that we activate the ODN for Suplier Invoices too. 
 
I tried to make a test for Supplier Invoices type X2. I have performed the settings as described in official documentation 

 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/4603118feda9495892abadbe8f8c3d14/b8e6820382bf4d779ae8ec8ab6f1e79c.html 

After creating the supplier invoice, I can see in sscui 103330 that the number range status has been incremented by one. Which means that the settings are correct. The ODN number for this invoice is 6105000001. But This number is not displayed on the invoice. 

For customer invoices I can see that the ODN number is stored in the field "Reference" at header level. But I can't find the ODN number in supplier invoice.

Is it mandatory to make extensibilty settings for  Apps "Manage Supplier Invoice Centrally", "Supplier Invoice List" or "Display Supplier Invoice" to see the ODN number in the document, as SAP suggest to do for some other Apps such as "Manage Supplier Line Items" ? 

Thank you for your help 

Erwan

entry.title: Enable Offline Store for Online OData Service in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently using an online OData service ( S/4HANA) - SSAM2405, but I would like to enable an offline store option so that functions like updates can be performed offline, similar to how offline services work.

This screenshot shows the offline service

Is there a way to enable offline store directly for an online OData service? If not, are there any alternatives or best practices to use an online service in a local/offline store?

Any guidance or suggestions would be highly appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: FUE License Consumption Ruleset
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently reviewing the SAP licensing model based on FUEs and I’ve run into an issue regarding the ruleset used to calculate FUE consumption.

According to SAP Note 3113382, the FUE measurement relies on a ruleset provided by SAP. However, the ruleset available today appears to be incomplete or outdated, as several usage scenarios and mappings seem to be missing. I haven’t found any official update or a more detailed version of the ruleset.

Does anyone have a more recent ruleset for FUE calculation or any additional documentation / information? 

Any insights, references, or experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Service instances stuck in Deletion in Progress
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I have 3 HDI service instances permanently stuck in
"delete failed" state on my BTP Trial account.

The underlying HANA Cloud DB has been deleted so
the broker cannot reach it to drop bindings.

cf purge-service-instance returns "not authorized"
even with OrgManager + SpaceManager roles on trial.

Cannot open SAP support case - trial has no customer number.

Please help force-purge these from backend:

Org : 1cf0785atrial
Space : dev
Region : US10

Service 1: Demo_cap-db
GUID: 352e6edf-b95b-414b-9f8b-91de53f4e9e6

Service 2: Demo_cap-hdiDemo_cap-db-deployer-ws-ood7l
GUID: f3726c62-bee3-4dff-813e-8441b0f282d3

Service 3: my-hana-db
GUID: 91ebb802-35f7-40c9-b6c8-565a685b48e7

Component: BC-XS-SRV-HSB

Thank you.

entry.title: /hana-ai issue in SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Hi Team

We are checking on the AI Tool Kit as part of the SAP BTP Build code for HANA Cloud, when we are using the /hana-ai agent to work on the forecast models, getting below issue, same issue for all the sample prompts. 

Please let us know if any other config needs to be done. 

Issue is: No database modules with .env found.

.env file is created in Database module and also bind the HDI key as well.  but same issue.

Thanks

Nag

entry.title: Unable to load SAP HANA Cloud Central
entry.content:
Hi everyone.
I am strarting in the SAP environment and I am currently using the BTP free trial.

I have already configurated the following subscriptions and the different Trust and Security configurations:
Cloud Identity Services
SAP Business Application Studio
SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition

All of them are working, however, when trying to log in SAP HANA Cloud, the loading page gets stuck and the following error logs appear on the dev screen:

Can anyone help me?
Is there anything I am missing to log into Cloud?

entry.title: How to drop, replace or at least modify a trigger in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a trigger directly in an HDI container schema with DB Explorer, assuming I had DROP privileges.

Well, I don't and I’m currently unable to drop, replace or modify it due to missing privileges.

I also attempted to delete it using dbadmin, but I get the same authorization issue. Redeploying the HDI container from BAS did not affect the trigger.

Is there a recommended way to handle this situation? Specifically, is it possible to modify or drop a trigger created directly in the schema?

entry.title: SAP HANA Client Silent Install via SCCM Missing ODBC
entry.content:
Dear all,

We are currently facing an issue with the SAP HANA package deployment via SCCM. When we assign the package to a PC, it appears to install successfully through Software Center. However, the ODBC configuration is not set up after the installation.

If we uninstall the package and then reinstall, the ODBC configuration is created correctly. This behavior occurs consistently on every machine.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or found a solution to ensure the ODBC configuration is properly applied during the initial installation? Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Extract data from supplier hub to HANA DB
entry.content:
We want to pull the data from the supplier Data Hub to our HANA Tables. What are the best options.

Currently they have given us login credentials where we can write a simple query and extract data to excel. or we can connect to power BI.

 

We want to bring that data to HANA tables, so we have all the historic data aswell in our DB

entry.title: SAP HANA Cloud Notifications
entry.content:
Dear SAP

 Is there notification with email after failed to extract data from source system ,for example S/4HANA

 

Best Regards 

Xia

entry.title: Not able to connect with SAP HANA database customized table,error connection refused 10907 on SAPgui
entry.content:
Not able to connect with SAP HANA database customized table, error connection refused 10907 on SAP S/4 HANA GUI

While accessing the customized table content from SE11, or activating the table getting this error. All tables are giving this connection error. No one able to access db table in our company.

I tried on SAP HANA interactive terminal also.

Getting this same error:


* -10709: Connection failed (RTE:[89006] System call 'recv' failed, rc=10054:An existing connection was forcibly closed by the remote host {192.***.***.***:62342 -> ***.***.***.***:8042} (192.***.***.***:62342 -> ******.****.*****.**u:8042)) SQLSTATE: HY000


hdbsql

entry.title: Migrating CRM Sales Orders & Service Contracts to SAP S/4HANA CE -Single Order Framework Feasibility
entry.content:
We are migrating from SAP CRM to S/4HANA Customer Engagement. We have three specific questions:

  • For CRM Sales Orders — is migration to S/4HANA SD (VA01) the only standard path, or is there any CE equivalent?
  • For Service Contracts originating in SD — should these migrate to CE Service Contracts (Fiori App F2358) or remain in SD?
  • In CRM we used a Single Order Framework covering both Sales and Service in one transaction. What is the recommended end-to-end process design in S/4HANA CE, where Sales is handled
  • outside of CE? How do others handle document flow continuity across SD and CE?

 

We need additional investigation on this topic. Any input from community members or SAP product experts on standard approaches, BTP integration patterns, or known gaps would be greatly appreciated.
